title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository – the easiest way to get up and running with large language models locally via Docker-style CLI.
highlights: CLI for pulling & running GGUF models

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: First-class LangChain integration for Ollama, allowing any LangChain chain/agent to run against locally served models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama REST API, published on npm as `ollama`.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client (`pip install ollama`) providing sync & async wrappers for the Ollama API.

title: ollama-webui
summary: A ChatGPT-like web & desktop UI for Ollama with multi-model chats, code highlighting, and RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin library for integrating Ollama into JVM projects, available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that swaps GitHub Copilot backend with a local Ollama model for privacy.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal reference implementation of Retrieval-Augmented Generation using Ollama + Chroma.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Rich-terminal chat wrapper around Ollama with markdown rendering, history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official-ish Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-affinity and PVC model caching.

title: ollama-nvidia-docker
summary: Docker images with CUDA runtime for running Ollama on NVIDIA GPUs, published to GHCR.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that lets a server chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-streamlit-chat
summary: Streamlit one-file file demonstrating a chat UI backed by Ollama and LangChain.

title: ollama-go
summary: Experimental Go client library for the Ollama API, idiomatic for Go devs.

title: ollama-ui
summary: Lightweight React-based web UI for Ollama, installable as a PWA.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing Ollama generators & embedders for pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate offering async bindings to the Ollama REST API with serde types.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library and ASP.NET Core integration for Ollama, available on NuGet.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds local AI completion, summarization, and Q&A powered by Ollama.
